title: Validation Types
description: Integrity check and fix types produced by the schema-driven validation engine.

IntegrityCategory.title: IntegrityCategory
IntegrityCategory.description: Category of integrity issue found in the artifact graph. Generic categories derived from schema-driven checks — no relationship keys or artifact types are hardcoded.

IntegrityCheck.title: IntegrityCheck
IntegrityCheck.description: A single integrity finding from the artifact graph validation run.

artifact_id.description: The ID of the artifact with the integrity issue.

message.description: Human-readable description of the integrity issue.

auto_fixable.description: Whether this issue can be automatically fixed.

fix_description.description: Description of the fix that would be applied if auto_fixable is true.

AppliedFix.title: AppliedFix
AppliedFix.description: A fix that was applied to resolve an integrity issue.

artifact_id.description: The ID of the artifact that was fixed.

description.description: Human-readable description of what was changed.

file_path.description: Relative path to the file that was modified.
